message:
feat: Worker RPC + edge page cache with VIP gating

- Refactor all DOs to extend DurableObject<Env> for zero-serialization RPC
- Add RPC methods (queryRpc, countRpc, existsRpc, firstRpc, explainRpc,
  streamRpc, appendRpc, scanRpc) — structured clone instead of JSON
- Add 3-tier page cache: L1 (WASM buffer pool) → L2 (caches.default) → L3 (R2)
- Gate L2 edge cache on VIP tables (accessCount >= 3) to prevent pollution
- Extract shared helpers: applyJsPostProcessing, assembleRowsFromColumns,
  executeCount, loadParquetR2Meta, loadParquetFragments, cacheIcebergDataset
- Fix missing "in" filter in JS post-processing path
- Fix bigint↔number coercion in Lance whole-file filter path
- Fix edgeCacheMisses inflation for non-VIP tables
- Fix error status codes (400 for parse, 500 for execution)
- Fix stack trace leak in handleQuery error response
- Add DurableObject polyfill for vitest compatibility
